summary: Created generate.py (724 lines) - main Meta Resume generator script that loads decomposed data, calls /zo/ask for semantic panel synthesis, calculates QFS, builds Evidence Trust Matrix, and assembles 3-page document.
decisions: Used /zo/ask API for semantic panel generation rather than template-based approach
Integrated github_snapshot module for GitHub data fetching
QFS calculation uses rating × importance × evidence_weight formula from D2
Evidence Trust Matrix aggregates by category × evidence_type
Critical Risks pulls from alignment.yaml gaps with importance weighting
PDF fallback via pandoc optional via --pdf flag
learnings: Panel-by-panel LLM synthesis produces more natural language than template filling
GitHub integration should fail gracefully - missing profile shouldn't block generation
Keep panel prompts focused on specific anti-patterns to avoid generic output
